title: Repo Codex Orchestrator
description: Repository-specific guidance for treating Codex OSS as Wave's operator shell, launcher runtime, and control-plane client.

activation.when: Attach when work changes the Codex-backed launcher, project-scoped Codex home, app-server integration, or orchestration command flow.

termination: Stop when the Codex-specific orchestration behavior, state roots, and control-plane actions are explicit and testable.
